summary: Iteration 2 testing of EligeHub SaaS new features: slot_minuti per docente, N:M docente-alunni associations (table 'pubblico'), Calendario/Alunni quick buttons. Backend: 33/33 pytest tests pass (22 regression iter1 + 11 new for iter2). Frontend: all 6 critical UI flows pass via Playwright (Durata column+select, DocenteAlunni page, /orari?docente=X preselect, Appuntamento form Durata standard text, cliente select restricted to associated alunni, auto-recalc 'Al' on 'Dal' change with slot_minuti=60, docente sees only own alunni in /clienti).

issues: Title shows 'Docente' label then docente name is rendered after async load -- briefly shows just 'Docente' before name appears. Works correctly after load.
Still uses native HTML date/time inputs (same note from iter1); functionality OK, including auto-recalc 'Al' but UX is browser-default.

action_items: (Optional) Replace native date/time inputs in Appuntamento modal with localized shadcn pickers (italian dd/mm/yyyy + 24h).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: docente_clienti collection has unique index on (studio_id, docente_id, cliente_id) and cascade cleanup in DELETE /docenti/{id} and DELETE /clienti/{id} (verified in tests).

Backend: POST /docenti/{id}/alunni/{cliente_id} is idempotent (returns {'message':'Già associato'} on duplicate; does NOT raise 409). Status code remains 201 for the path even on duplicate; consider returning 200 in that case for clarity but current behavior is acceptable.
Backend: GET /clienti?docente_id=X is admin-only filter; docente role ignores the param and always returns own alunni (correctly enforced).
Backend: /disponibilita falls back to docente.slot_minuti when slot_minuti query param is absent (verified with default=60 vs explicit=30 -- twice as many slots).
Backend: DocenteUpdate.slot_minuti correctly accepts None (skipped) and integer values via Pydantic model_dump(exclude_unset=True).
Frontend: DocenteAlunni.jsx wraps fetch in async, but the page title shows 'Docente' before name resolves. Consider rendering 'Caricamento...' for title until docente is loaded, or include skeleton.

Frontend: Appuntamenti.jsx onDalChange uses slot_minuti from selected docente -> Al correctly recalculated; useEffect on form.docente_id reloads alunni list properly (validated by test asserting Verdi+Neri appear in select).
seed_data_creation: Test fixtures create TEST_ prefixed docenti and clienti and clean them up afterwards. Demo seed (Marco Bianchi + Luca Verdi + Giulia Neri + 2 associations) is verified present by both backend and UI tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run all backend tests: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://timeslot-manager-23.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The env var is required because backend_test.py reads it without a default. 33 tests cover auth, RBAC, multi-tenant, CRUD, overlap, disponibilita, dashboard, slot_minuti, docente-alunni N:M, cascade cleanup. UI testids: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-button, logout-button, docente-row-{id}, docente-calendar-{id}, docente-alunni-{id}, docente-durata-select, docente-alunni-page, alunno-row-{id}, alunno-remove-{id}, associa-alunno-button, associa-cliente-select, app-docente-select, app-cliente-select, app-dal-input, app-al-input.
